getMySubscriptions(uint256[]).notice: Get encrypted subscription expiries. Only buyer can unseal.

renewSubscription(uint256).notice: Renew subscription. Extends from now (not from previous expiry).

requestAccess(uint256,bytes32,bytes32).notice: Grant buyer access. Works for both one-time and subscription content.

subscribe(uint256).notice: Subscribe to content. Expiry is FHE-encrypted — only buyer can see it.

userdoc.notice: Privacy-preserving content marketplace with FHE subscriptions. SUBSCRIPTION MODEL:   - subscriptionDuration > 0 means content is subscription-based   - subscriptionDuration == 0 means one-time purchase   - Subscription expiry is FHE-encrypted — only buyer can see when it expires   - Buyer's subscription feed is private — decrypted only in their browser
